steps.title: Use the force relationship
steps.content:
The force is the product of mass and acceleration. In symbols,
$$F=ma$$

steps.title: Substitute the mass
steps.content:
The mass is $36$ kilograms and the acceleration is $a$, so
$$F=36a$$

steps.title: Select the matching equation
steps.content: The equation that represents the product of $36$ and $a$ is $F=36a$. The answer is A.
